import sys
input = sys.stdin.readline

t = int(input())
for _ in range(t):
    n = int(input())
    a = list(map(int, input().split()))
    b = [0]*n
    start = 0
    if n % 2 == 1:
        # handle first 3
        i,j,k = 0,1,2
        if a[i]+a[j] != 0:
            b[i]=a[j]; b[j]=-a[i]  # wait, need a[i]*b[i]+a[j]*b[j]=0 => a[i]*a[j]-a[j]*a[i]=0 yes
            # but then a[k]*b[k]=0 needed... no, just pair i,j and leave k
            # Actually for 3: b[i]=a[j], b[j]=-a[i], b[k]= need a[k]*b[k]=0, impossible
        # must do all 3 together
        if a[j]+a[k] != 0:
            b[i]=a[j]+a[k]; b[j]=-a[i]; b[k]=-a[i]
        elif a[i]+a[j] != 0:
            b[i]=a[k]; b[j]=a[k]; b[k]=-(a[i]+a[j])  # wait: a[i]*a[k]+a[j]*a[k]-a[k]*(a[i]+a[j])=0 yes, but b[k]=-(a[i]+a[j])
        else:
            b[i]=a[k]; b[j]=a[k]; b[k]=-(a[i]+a[j])
        start=3
    for i in range(start, n, 2):
        b[i]=a[i+1]; b[i+1]=-a[i]
    print(*b)
